name: separator
description: A visual divider between content sections with horizontal or vertical orientation.

props.name: decorative
props.description: If true, separator is purely visual and hidden from screen readers

examples.title: Vertical
examples.description: Vertical divider in a flex row

ai.whenToUse: Use to visually separate content sections, menu items, or sidebar groups.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for spacing (use margin/padding). Don't use between every list item.
commonMistakes: Using as spacing instead of semantic separation
ai.accessibilityNotes: Set decorative=false if the separator conveys semantic meaning. Radix handles role='separator'.
